daily_image.alt: A loving family photo for Meme

prayer.title: Sacred Heart Prayer
prayer.text: Sacred Heart of Jesus, I place all my trust in You. Keep me close to Your mercy today, and let Your love be stronger than my worries. Amen.
prayer.source: Short devotion to the Sacred Heart of Jesus

thought.headline: You are loved beyond measure.
thought.body: Before any test result, before any update, before anything you can do or cannot do: you are God’s beloved daughter. Nothing in this room can take that away.
thought.verse: I have called you by name: you are mine. — Isaiah 43:1

blessing: May your room feel lighter today, filled with grace and love.
practice: If you have the energy, pray one decade of the Rosary slowly.

daily_readings.label: USCCB Daily Mass Readings
daily_readings.note: Read or listen to today’s Catholic Mass readings from the United States Conference of Catholic Bishops.
